title: An ICCD camera-based time-domain ultrasound-switchable fluorescence imaging system.
author: Yu S Yao T Yuan B
content: S-EPMC6646316 PMC6646316 An ICCD camera-based time-domain ultrasound-switchable fluorescence imaging system. Fluorescence imaging in centimeter-deep tissues with high resolution is highly desirable for many biomedical applications. Recently, we have developed a new imaging modality
